issue.title: Bare except Exception: pass silently swallows ALL exceptions during intelligence hook execution
issue.actual_behavior: Six detection hooks in _detect_telegram_memory_authority_source_kind() (runtime.py lines 302-330) are wrapped in bare except Exception: pass blocks. Any exception from regex failures, encoding errors, or unexpected None values is silently swallowed with no log output, making runtime failures invisible.
issue.expected_behavior: Exceptions during intelligence hook execution should be logged at WARNING level with full traceback via logging.warning(exc_info=True), allowing operators to detect and diagnose hook failures.
repro_steps: Trigger any exception inside one of the 6 detection hooks (e.g. _detect_current_plan_transition_command, detect_profile_fact_observation, etc.)
Observe: no log output, no traceback, function silently returns None
After fix: WARNING log with full traceback for each failure
issue.affected_workflow: Intelligence hook execution in telegram adapter runtime - memory authority source detection

evidence.before_after_proof: BEFORE: 6 bare except Exception: pass blocks in _detect_telegram_memory_authority_source_kind (lines 302-330 of src/spark_intelligence/adapters/telegram/runtime.py). AFTER: Each block replaced with except Exception: _logger.warning('intelligence hook <name> failed', exc_info=True). Added import logging and _logger = logging.getLogger(__name__). Lint passes.

proposed_fix.approach: Replace bare except Exception: pass with except Exception: _logger.warning('...', exc_info=True) in all 6 blocks of _detect_telegram_memory_authority_source_kind(). Add import logging at module top and _logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) at module level. No API surface change, no new dependencies.
proposed_fix.tests_or_smoke: Lint passes (ast.parse ok). Existing tests exercise the happy path. Fix only adds logging to error paths — no behavioral change for successful hook detection. Verified no duplicate import logging introduced.

review_claim.duplicate_notes: Searched existing PRs and branches for fixes to _detect_telegram_memory_authority_source_kind or intelligence hook exception handling. No prior PR addresses silent exception swallowing in this function.
review_claim.risk_notes: Low risk: only changes error-path behavior from silent pass to logged warning. No API surface change, no new dependencies (logging is stdlib). No change to successful execution path.
